commands.cmd:
out=$(curl -fsS --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:18099/stub_status) || { echo "nginx stub_status unreachable" >&2; exit 1; }
n=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '/^Active connections:/{print $3}')
case "$n" in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "active_connections non-numeric: $n" >&2; exit 1;; esac
printf '{"healthy":true,"active_connections":%d}' "$n"
commands.stderr:
curl: (7) Failed to connect to 127.0.0.1 port 18099 after 0 ms: Couldn't connect to server
nginx stub_status unreachable
